dominant_phrases: I can't wait to get rid of it
I want to simplify my life, not complicate it
specific_references: San Clemente listing drone footage from his photographer
Agent Elite (the old website provider he wants off of)
a blog service that posted tips about keeping snow off your porch, in Southern California
IDX listing maps for Dana Point
American Home Realty and American Home Loans, his companies, blue and red colors
opinions_expressed: Websites don't generate money for me. I'm burning through money. He dislikes his old site and can't wait to get rid of it.
Generic auto-posted blog content makes an agent look stupid: snow posts in Southern California where there's never snow
Bland AI content with no personal input is low value; readers bounce when they smell AI fingerprints
Daily video posting on every platform is not him: 'That's not me. I'm from a different point in life.'
It's out of my comfort zone, but let's do it (on recording voice memos)
The whole key of real estate is getting back to people quickly
He'd rather create new business through probate and divorce than wait on past clients to move
